rationale: Educ. Code §21.909 governs commissioner rules for educator preparation partnership programs. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote:
The commissioner shall adopt rules establishing:
(1) standards for partnership programs established under this subchapter, including eligibility criteria for educator preparation programs and institutions of higher education to participate in the partnership programs; and
(2) performance goals for partnership programs established under this subchapter.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and this education partnership program statute.
